scenarios.title: Distributed PyTorch Training and Large Model Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Distributed training loops, launchers, DeepSpeed/FSDP/TPU backends, PyTorch Lightning/Fabric, scalable GNN training, checkpoints, and memory planning.
scenarios.role: Build, configure, debug, distribute, and deploy PyTorch Lightning and Lightning Fabric workflows using Trainer, LightningModule, LightningCLI, Fabric, accelerators, strategies, and serving utilities.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `lightning` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: cli configuration, deployment serving, distributed accelerators, fabric expert loops, and training core.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `lightning` when the request names `lightning`, centers on building, configure, debugging, distribute, and deploy PyTorch Lightning and Lightning Fabric workflows using Trainer, LightningModule, LightningCLI, Fabric, accelerators, strategies, and serving utilities, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in distributed pytorch training and large model workflows. Then route to CLI configuration, deployment serving, distributed accelerators, or fabric expert loops when those focused workflows match.
